title: Single cell sequencing of the proliferative endometrium
author: Nageswara Rao Boggavarapu
content: E-MTAB-10947 Single cell sequencing of the proliferative endometrium RNA-seq of coding RNA from single cells EFO EFO_0005684 Human - Single-cell sequencing Homo sapiens Endometrial biopsies were collected on menstrual cycle day 7 from healthy fertile women age 24-42. Biopsies were processed
